pages.text: The $(thing)Storage Terminal$() is your primary interface to the network. It displays a $(thing)6x9 grid$() of all stored items with a scroll bar for browsing.

$(thing)Taking items:$()$(br)$(li)$(thing)Left-click$() a stack to pick up the full stack.$(li)$(thing)Right-click$() to pick up half the stack.$(li)$(thing)Shift-click$() to move the full stack to your inventory.$(li)$(thing)Scroll wheel$() or drag the scroll bar to browse all items.

$(thing)Putting items:$()$(br)$(li)$(thing)Shift-click$() items from your inventory to insert them into the network.$(br2)$(thing)Search bar:$() Type at the top to filter displayed items by name. Case-sensitive filtering is supported.$(br2)$(thing)Tooltips:$() Hover over any item to see its full name and count.

The Storage Terminal is $(thing)Tier 1$() - it handles basic item transfer but does not include crafting features.$(br2)For crafting capabilities, upgrade to the $(l:magic_storage:crafting_terminal)$(thing)Crafting Terminal$()$(). For remote access, check out the $(l:magic_storage:remote_terminal)$(thing)Remote Terminal$()$().
